seo.title: What are Financial Market Cycles?
seo.description: Market cycles reflect the recurring phases of expansion, peak, contraction, and decline that shape price movements across financial markets. This article explains how these cycles work, how they relate to economic conditions, and how traders can use them to time strategies and manage risk.
